name: Newport News Public Schools
districtFact: Newport News Public Schools is the public school division serving Newport News, Virginia in the Hampton Roads region. NNPS publishes school calendar PDFs with first day, last student day, teacher workdays, exam dates, graduation windows, religious observances, and Peninsula spring break notes.

about.title: About Newport News Public Schools
about.content: Newport News Public Schools, also known as NNPS, is the public school division serving Newport News, Virginia in the Hampton Roads area. The district calendar lists all-student report dates, holidays, winter break, spring break, teacher planning days, regional professional development days, exam dates, high school graduations, early dismissals, and report card periods.

about.title: How to Use This NNPS Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning. Families should confirm school-specific events, bell schedules, graduation details, testing windows, and emergency make-up decisions through Newport News Public Schools and their campus.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Newport News Families
content: Track half-day dismissal and early dismissal dates separately because they affect pickup and childcare even when school is in session.
Review January and June exam dates for high school schedule changes.
Use the report card period table for grading-cycle planning.
Check the official NNPS calendars page for revised PDFs and superintendent-directed make-up day changes.

customSections.label: Newport News Public Schools District Overview
customSections.content: Newport News Public Schools (NNPS) is the public school division serving students in Newport News, Virginia, in the Hampton Roads region. The district operates elementary, middle, and high school campuses and publishes a 2026-2027 school year calendar covering instructional days, student holidays, teacher workdays, professional development days, testing windows, graduation dates, school closing schedules, and report card periods. Families use the NNPS academic calendar and school year calendar to plan attendance, vacations, childcare, transportation, and important school-year activities.

customSections.label: About MySchoolDates Education Research Team
customSections.content: The MySchoolDates Education Research Team reviews public school calendar sources, compares published district dates, and maintains structured calendar data for families researching school schedules. For NNPS, the team checks the official calendar source, verifies key dates, and generates the calendar download file from reviewed records.

customSections.label: About Newport News Public Schools Calendar
customSections.content: The Newport News Public Schools calendar is the districtwide academic calendar for students, families, teachers, and school staff in Newport News, Virginia. It helps families track the first student day, last student day, school holidays, winter and spring breaks, teacher workdays, high school exam windows, early dismissal dates, and tentative graduation dates. MySchoolDates reorganizes the official NNPS calendar into a searchable school year calendar with Printable Newport News Public Schools Calendar access and a one-time calendar import for family planning.

customSections.label: Who Uses This NNPS Calendar?
customSections.content: The NNPS school calendar is used by families, students, teachers, school staff, and caregivers who need a practical view of the districtwide academic year.

groups.label: Common calendar users
items: Parents and caregivers use the calendar to plan childcare, vacations, transportation, and no-school days.
Students use it to track the first day, exam windows, breaks, early dismissals, and the last student day.
Teachers and school staff use it to review teacher workdays, professional development days, grading periods, and school closing dates.
Senior families use tentative graduation dates and exam windows for end-of-year planning.

customSections.label: School Closures & Important Schedule Changes
customSections.content: The NNPS calendar includes more than major school breaks. Families should also track student holidays, teacher workdays, early dismissal days, high school exam dates, and tentative graduation dates because each can affect transportation, childcare, and after-school plans.

groups.label: Schedule categories to watch
items: Student holidays and school closures include districtwide holidays, Winter Break, Spring Break, and listed no-school dates.
Teacher workdays and professional development days may be no-school days for students even when staff report.
Early dismissal days can affect pickup, after-school care, and transportation even when students attend school.
High school exam dates appear in January and June and may use half-day or early dismissal schedules.
High school graduation dates are listed as tentative, so families should confirm final dates, times, and locations with NNPS.

customSections.label: Parent Planning Guide for NNPS 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families can use the Newport News Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar to plan vacations, childcare, school transportation, exam weeks, and graduation-related activities around districtwide dates.

groups.label: Planning notes for families
items: Plan back-to-school preparation before August 24, 2026, when all students report.
Winter Break runs December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027, with students returning after the January planning day.
Spring Break runs April 5-9, 2027 and is noted as the first week of April for Peninsula school divisions.
High school families should watch January and June exam periods because early dismissal schedules can change transportation and after-school plans.
Graduation dates are listed as tentative, so senior families should confirm final times and locations with NNPS before making travel plans.

compareIntro: Compare the Newport News Public Schools calendar with other Virginia district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Newport News Public Schools calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official NNPS school calendar PDFs for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: When is spring break for Newport News Public Schools?
districtFaqs.a: NNPS notes that Spring Break is scheduled annually during the first week of April for Peninsula school divisions.

districtFaqs.q: Does Newport News list exam and graduation dates?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The NNPS calendar includes high school exam dates, high school graduation dates, and early dismissal dates near the end of the school year.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify NNPS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Newport News Public Schools calendars page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with NNPS.
